purpose: Session memory for invented NPCs who are not full characters yet.

policy.background_npcs: Disposable background NPCs may speak, move, react, argue, joke, eat, train or interrupt, but are not saved unless they become meaningful.
policy.functional_npcs: Functional NPCs perform a scene task. Save them only if named, repeated, witness something important, notice a hook, or affect relationships/plot.
policy.important_npcs: Save invented NPCs with a name, repeated appearance, personal attitude, role, conflict, rumor value, relationship effect, witness value or future hook.
policy.promotion_rule: If an NPC becomes major enough for long-term canon, promote later into characters/<id>/ files. Until then keep them here.
policy.variation_rule: NPCs must not all react the same way to Akira, Raiden, Ray, Miki, Haru, Yuna or authority.
policy.knowledge_rule: NPCs know only what they saw, heard, were told, already know from state, or can plausibly infer from visible signs.
